## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Breaking change

## Related issue

Link issue(s), if applicable:

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated (README/docs) if behavior changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs special attention, tradeoffs, or follow-up work.
